creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206851
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.28.2 builds. (Also does the style fixes, clean up and fix build failures in 13-CURRENT))

In addition to the clean up and version update, build failures in 13.0-CURRENT are also fixed.

For more information on the build failures see https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-src-all/2019-August/184844.html

Adds the following file

files/patch-mozilla-release_media_mtransport_third__party_nICEr_src_stun_stun.h

based on the above information
